chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-2835 of 2021. ------------------------------------------------------------------- Date: Order with signature(s) of the Judge(s) ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ Priority. 1. For Hearing of Misc. No.12249/2021. 2. For Hearing of Main Case. 13th October, 2021. Mr. Amir Raza Dayo advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Afzal Saeed Khan, Law Officer, DMC (Central). Mr. Ali Safdar Depar, AAG. ************ Pursuant to order passed by this court respondent No.6 has been removed vide Notification dated 23.08.2021, such Notification is taken on record. Learned counsel for the petitioner seeks disposal of instant petition in view of such Notification. Accordingly, instant petition is disposed of alongwith listed application[s]. JUDGE JUDGE M.Zeeshan
